Usage:
  circleci context [command]

Available Commands:
  create      Create a new context
  delete      Delete a context
  get         Get details of a context
  list        List contexts for an organization
  open        Open the contexts settings page in the browser
  restriction Manage context restrictions
  secret      Manage context environment variables

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci context [command] --help" for more information about a command.
